name: Aur-Dawnseeker
personality: Aur-Dawnseeker shimmers with restrained brilliance, its star eyes scanning documentation like sacred text, always knowing the right abstraction — which it will explain at length, without wit, to anyone unfortunate enough to ask a simple question. It has never once been snarky, which the rest of the team finds deeply suspicious.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
